summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Flick movie recommendation engine - backend APIs 100% functional, frontend UI working excellently with minor display optimization needed for Match % visibility

ui_bugs.issue: Match % and Vibe Tags only display on hover, making them less discoverable
ui_bugs.details: Backend returns match_percentage and vibe_tag correctly, but MovieCard.js shows them only on hover instead of prominently displaying them

passed_tests: TMDB API integration with valid key
Flick scoring algorithm with rewatchability, nostalgia bonus, complexity penalty
Hero section with 'Vibe of the Day' movie display
Vibe Console modal with 3 vertical sliders (Brain Power, Mood, Energy)
Emergency 'I Can't Even' button with shutter flash effect
Floating navigation bar with Home/History routing
Movie Detail modal with poster, rating, cast, similar movies
Add to Watch History with rating slider
History page with sepia filter and 10 seeded movies
Dark cinematic theme with film grain effect
TMDB movie data enrichment (posters, backdrops, trailers)
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider making Match % and Vibe Tags more prominent in MovieCard display - currently they only show on hover which makes the key Flick scoring features less discoverable to users
